response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience and relevant technologies like TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP). However, there is limited explicit evidence of GenAI-specific work (e.g., RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent systems) beyond MCP and AI-agent infrastructure. His background in AI-driven solutions is not clearly demonstrated in the resume.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript and Node.js
Experience with MCP and AI-agent infrastructure, indicating exposure to modern GenAI tools
Proven track record in cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and scalable systems
concerns: Limited direct experience with GenAI core technologies (RAG, vector databases, multi-agent systems)
No explicit mention of LLM performance metrics or optimization techniques
Unclear depth of experience with production-grade AI solution delivery for enterprise customers
